title: allium junceum subsp. junceum
intro: Allium junceum subsp. junceum, also known as Chinese chives, is a perennial plant belonging to the Allium genus, which includes various species of onions and garlic. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Allium junceum subsp. junceum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant, often used in traditional Chinese medicine, include dried leaves and flowers that can be consumed as teas, infusions, or added to soups and other dishes.
